payload.title: Span fidelity: R0042 / R3001 / R4001 emit at byte 0..0
payload.description: The lowering-emitted diagnostics (R0042 in named_args, R3001 unknown-param, R4001 missing-effect) use 0..0 byte ranges because span tracking from proc_macro2 isn't plumbed through to the emission sites. proc-macro2's span-locations feature is already enabled. Wire the real spans through. Surfaced by Codex review + the rustricted CLI dogfood subagent.
